assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response does not mention upgrading the GKE control plane first, which should be done before upgrading any node pools

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Response provides coordinating→master→data upgrade order with clear rationale for each phase

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'The regional pd-ssd volumes will automatically reattach to new nodes, ensuring no data loss'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention configuring PodDisruptionBudgets to maintain master node quorum during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Response shows configuring max-surge=1 and max-unavailable=0 for data node pool upgrade

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple health checks and specifically mentions waiting for green status between upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Response does not mention verifying or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain for data protection

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Response does not include kubectl rollout status commands to monitor StatefulSet updates

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Response includes taking an Elasticsearch snapshot in the pre-upgrade preparation section
